arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer now virtually guaranteed as suitors expected for substitute
arts.sum: Ian Doyle looks at the talking points as Liverpool move within three points of the Premier League title after victory at Leicester City on Sunday

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares Liverpool plan before title clash as message sent to 'sensational' supporters
arts.sum: The Reds are one win away from Premier League glory after victory at Leicester

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest as Arne Slot addresses Liverpool right-back's future after Leicester City win
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot addresses question marks about Trent Alexander-Arnold's future following the side's 1-0 Premier League victory against Leicester City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: A win away from the title, Liverpool coronation begins at Leicester
arts.sum: Liverpool's fans were already celebrating the title in the win at Leicester. The team itself will soon join in.

arts.ttl: Alexander-Arnold critics ‘ridiculous’ says Slot after Liverpool edge closer
arts.athr: Ben Fisher at the King Power Stadium
arts.sum: Leaders three points from clinching Premier League title Full-back’s winner was first goal for club with his left foot Arne Slot said it is “ridiculous” to dispute Trent Alexander-Arnold’s commitment to Liverpool after he scored the only goal at Leicester to push his club closer to a 20th league title. The 26-year-old, who is expected to join Real Madrid on a free this summer, fired in his first left-foot goal for his boyhood club on his return from an ankle injury to secure victory and condemn Leicester to relegation. Alexander-Arnold, who scored within five minutes of replacing Conor Bradley, is poised to join Real on a long-term contract when his Liverpool contract expires. He celebrated at Leicester by removing his shirt and Kostas Tsimikas placed it on the corner flag nearest to the away fans. Following the match the full-back soaked up their adulation after Virgil van Dijk ushered him towards them. Alexander-Arnold, who joined Liverpool aged six, has won every domestic trophy with the club, plus the Champions League. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits he is still in the dark over his Leicester future but insists he has no regrets despite Foxes' relegation after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy stressed his disappointment after Leicester City were relegated back to the Championship but admitted that he is still in the dark over his own future at the club.

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man Utd monitor Leipzig's Simons - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to holds talks about the futures of Luis Diaz, Ibrahima Konate and Diogo Jota, Liverpool and Manchester United keen on RB Leipzig winger Xavi Simons, Moise Kean could stay at Fiorentina despite interest from Premier League clubs, plus more.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards disagree on Liverpool Trent Alexander-Arnold send off stance
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Jamie Carragher debates with Micah Richards and Roy Keane about the possible effect of Trent Alexander-Arnold leaving the club

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher insists Trent Alexander-Arnold 'should NOT start' for Liverpool if he hasn't committed to the club for next season - and makes prediction over his future
arts.sum: The right back, whose contract at Anfield expires at the end of the season, has been strongly linked with a move to Real Madrid and is expected to leave Liverpool as a free agent.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher brings Liverpool fans down to earth with Trent Alexander-Arnold response
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold celebrated passionately after scoring the decisive goal in Liverpool's 1-0 win away to Leicester on Sunday, and Jamie Carragher reckons that there could be more to it
